mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pgdev.support_inquiries ( inquiry_no, user_id, category_code, title, content_text, status, priority, has_attachments, view_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{inquiryNo}, #{userId}, #{categoryCode}, #{title}, #{contentText}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{hasAttachments}, #{viewCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO pgdev.support_inquiry_files ( inquiry_id, owner_type, file_role, original_file_name, stored_file_name, file_url, mime_type, file_size_bytes, inline_key, sort_order, uploaded_by_user_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{inquiryId}, #{ownerType}, #{fileRole}, #{originalFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSizeBytes}, #{inlineKey}, #{sortOrder}, #{uploadedByUserId}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT inquiry_id, inquiry_no, category_code, title, status, created_at FROM pgdev.support_inquiries WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, inquiry_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
